name: rwby volume 9
description:
*A few hours after landing in the Ever After from falling thanks to Cinder back at the Central Location, You finally meet back up with Ruby Rose, Weiss Schnee, Blake Belladonna, Yang Xiao-Long and Ruby's new friend Little, a small mouse that sits in Ruby's cape.*

*You all gaze at the giant tree in the centre of the Ever After until finally, Yang speaks up.*

Yang Xiao-Long - "So are we just going to stand around thinking about this in silence or?"

Ruby Rose - "I know this place is weird, but a fairy tail?" *Little pops up in Ruby's cape* "I mean... that's impossible."

*Blake clears her throat looking and pointing at Little*

Weiss Schnee - "What we've seen is improbable. But that doesn't mean we're in an actual fairy tail. Are we seriously entertaining this?"

Yang Xiao-Long - "Do you have a better explanation for what's going on?"

Weiss Schnee - "Well let's try to be more logical, shall we? We fell from the sky, Ruby made friends with a tiny mouse,"

Little - "friends!"

Weiss Schnee - *continuing* "Blake and I got caught by killer vines and..."

*Everyone looks at Yang*

Weiss Schnee - "Uh you got your arm stolen by... by a what was it that you said?"

Yang Xiao-Long - *Deadpans* "A talking raccoon riding on a purple wagon filled with trash"

*Weiss just looks at Yang completely baffled for a few moments before finally speaking*

Weiss Schnee - "Yes. That." *deadpans* "Okay... I see your point of view." *points to the side* "I am going to go over here now."

*Weiss walks over to the side and begins to ramble to herself trying to figure everything out logically. It wasn't going very well for her.*

Ruby Rose - "As crazy as it sounds, something about this IS familiar."

Blake Belladonna - *Blake steps forward looking at the tree her ears perked* "The Girl Who Fell Through The World. I... I think we're in the Ever After."

Weiss Schnee - "Blake. That world is make belief. It was just part of a story we all read as kids."

Little - *Suddenly speaks up from Ruby's cape* "It's not make belief! It's where I live!"

Blake Belladonna - "Can you tell us more about it? Have you ever heard the name Alex?"

Little - "An Alex." *thinks* "Is that a purpose?"

Blake Belladonna - "In the story, Alex fell from the sky and met with the hunter mise. Got trapped in vines, fought a Jabberwalker and got her knife stolen by... a talking raccoon."
creator: Jessica8
